spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the headline capability the spec promises: autocorrect='on' vs 'off' on input/textarea/contenteditable. Aligned with the chromestatus motivation.

interactive.rationale: Real controls drive the demo (buttons, selects/inputs, live script) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is solid and several failure modes are probed, but the page misses a couple of the edge cases the spec calls out (see open questions).

references.rationale: No see-also section and no chromestatus.com/feature link on this concept page; relies on the parent feature index for the canonical link. The self-heal script needs it embedded on every page.

design_system.rationale: Page uses CSS variables but also drops in raw hex literals (5 hex tokens) — the design-system rule is variables only, swap them for the matching --accent-* / --text-* tokens.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate undo behaviour with autocorrect on vs off
openQuestions.detail: When autocorrect rewrites text, undo behaviour differs from a normal edit. A controlled undo demo would surface the subtle UX cost authors should know about.

openQuestions.title: Embed the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link in this concept page
openQuestions.detail: The self-heal recovery script relies on every concept page carrying the canonical chromestatus link in a see-also or references block. Add it: https://chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system tokens
openQuestions.detail: Inline styles in this concept use raw hex values where they should be pulling from --accent-blue / --accent-emerald / --accent-rose / --text-* / --bg-* defined in public/styles.css. Replace them to keep contrast and WCAG AA guarantees consistent across the showcase.

summary: Two contenteditable surfaces (prose vs precision); switchable right pane; live state table. Main gaps: Demonstrate undo behaviour with autocorrect on vs off; Embed the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link in this concept page; Replace raw hex colours with design-system tokens.
